task_completion.description: Open the 'Office Furniture - Deco Addict' opportunity in the CRM

The Priority field (represented by stars) has exactly 2 stars highlighted or selected.
The 'Tags' field contains a tag labeled 'Enterprise'.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the database
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form appears in a saved/read-only state, or a 'Saved' indicator (like a cloud icon with a checkmark) is visible, with no unsaved changes warnings.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to interact with the CRM
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the CRM interface, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually interacted with the form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show dropdowns, cursors in input fields, or tag selection menus being actively used.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open in any of the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target opportunity is 'Office Furniture - Deco Addict'. The correct target values to verify are: Expected Revenue = $75,000, Probability = 60%, Priority = 2 stars, and Tag = 'Enterprise'. Initial values before modification were Revenue $25,000, Probability 20%, Priority 0 stars, and no tags.
